transcript:
CALLER: Hello. I just want to confirm — if I pay online, is the payment secure? I'm a bit old-fashioned and worried about these things.
AGENT: That's a very fair concern. Our online payment portal uses bank-level SSL encryption and we do not store any card or UPI details. All transactions go through RBI-regulated payment gateways.
CALLER: And if something goes wrong with the transaction?
AGENT: If a payment fails or is deducted but not confirmed, please note the transaction ID and call us. We'll verify and ensure your record is updated or the amount is refunded within 5-7 working days.
CALLER: Okay, I feel better about it now. Thank you for explaining.
AGENT: Always happy to help. Please feel free to call anytime!
